meta.title: Corporate Furnished Rentals Paris | Move in Paris
meta.description: Premium furnished rentals in Paris for companies, corporates & expats. Free landlord service, corporate lease, fully managed. 200+ blue-chip clients (L'Oréal, LVMH, Goldman).

hero.subtitle: High-end furnished apartments in the heart of Paris, exclusively for companies and their international employees.

partners.title: They trust us to house their employees

corporate.title: Corporate rentals
corporate.description: High-end furnished apartments for your relocating employees. From studios to 4-room flats in the finest Paris neighborhoods.

management.title: Operational management
management.description: Landlords: our service is 100% free — zero management fees, zero commission. We handle tenants, maintenance, admin, accounting — you receive 100% of the agreed rent.

legal.title: Compliance & legal
legal.description: Secure Civil Code leases (articles 1714-1762), up-to-date property surveys, comprehensive home insurance included. Every aspect of the lease is legally protected.

technical.title: Technical assistance
technical.description: Plumbing, electrical, locks, appliances: our team handles everything through a trusted network of craftsmen. Monday to Friday 9am-7pm, 24/7 emergency line.

reasons.title: Rent guaranteed by employers
reasons.text: Our clientele is exclusively corporate: major companies and international institutions. Rent is underwritten by the employer — zero unpaid rent.

reasons.title: Superior yield
reasons.text: On average +30% extra revenue compared to a standard lease. Up to €55/m² on corporate leases.

reasons.title: Single, accountable contact
reasons.text: Move in Paris is your only point of contact and takes full responsibility for the condition of your property. 7/7 technical assistance.

testimonials.title: Google reviews
testimonials.ratingAria: See our Google reviews — rating 4.8 out of 5

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Whether you're a landlord or looking for accommodation for your employees, our team is here to help.
contact.successDetail: We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.tagline: Paris agency specializing in corporate furnished rentals and expat relocation support.
footer.copyright: Move in Paris. All rights reserved.

cookies.title: Your privacy preferences

cookies.essentialDesc: Cookies essential to the website (language, security). Always active.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site to improve it (e.g. Google Analytics).
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to deliver content and ads matching your interests.

about.metaTitle: About — Move in Paris | Corporate furnished rentals Paris
about.metaDescription: Move in Paris offers a turnkey rental solution for companies and expatriates. Discover our 6 commitments and our tailored approach.
about.heroSubtitle: A turnkey rental solution for companies and expatriates.
about.introP1: specializes in furnished apartment rentals with services, dedicated exclusively to companies and their international employees.
about.introP2: As a partner landlord, you benefit from comprehensive operational management and optimal valorization of your property, with zero day-to-day hassle.
about.introP3: Our Transaction service also guides you through every step of buying or selling a property, whether it's your residence or a turnkey rental investment.

engagements.title: Quality apartments
engagements.desc: We maintain a high standard of quality: every apartment is regularly inspected and kept in the condition you entrusted to us.

engagements.title: Single point of contact
engagements.desc: Move in Paris is your only contact and takes full responsibility for the condition of your property. One accountable partner, zero complexity.

engagements.title: 7/7 technical assistance
engagements.desc: Our tenants benefit from 7/7 technical assistance. Every issue is handled immediately, your property is preserved at all times.

engagements.title: Cleaning included
engagements.desc: Weekly housekeeping is provided by our qualified in-house staff. Your apartment is continuously maintained, at no cost to you.

engagements.title: Premium corporate clientele
engagements.desc: Major companies, international institutions and their expatriate employees. Rent is guaranteed by the employer — zero unpaid rent.

engagements.title: Full operational management
engagements.desc: Technical follow-up, interventions, repair coordination. You have nothing to manage — we take care of everything.

about.ctaSubtitle: Discover our selection of high-end furnished apartments across Paris.

owners.metaTitle: Landlords — Corporate furnished rentals Paris | Move in Paris
owners.metaDescription: Entrust your apartment to Move in Paris: 100% free service, guaranteed rent, full management. +30% revenue vs standard rental.
owners.heroSubtitle: Maximize your property and earn guaranteed rent with zero management fees.
owners.bannerText1: Zero listing fees, zero management fees, zero commission on your rent. You receive the full agreed rent —
owners.introP1: Do you own an apartment in Paris or the inner suburbs? Entrust it to Move in Paris and benefit from full operational management and optimal valorization of your property.
owners.introP2a: Our exclusive clientele — major companies, international institutions — guarantees rent paid by the employer. Result:
owners.introP3b: : electricity, gas, internet + TV, building charges, boiler maintenance, waste collection tax — everything is included. No adjustments, no invoices to handle.

avantages.title: 100% free service
avantages.desc: No listing fees, no management fees, no commission on your rent. You receive 100% of the agreed rent, with zero deductions. We're paid exclusively by our corporate clients.

avantages.title: All-inclusive rent
avantages.desc: The rent you receive each month is charges-included: electricity, gas, internet + TV + Canal+, building charges, boiler maintenance, waste tax. No adjustments, no surprise invoices. Everything is covered by our model.

avantages.title: Premium corporate clientele
avantages.desc: Major companies, international institutions and expatriate employees. Each file is vetted: solvency, employer, guarantees. Rent guaranteed by the employer — zero unpaid rent.

avantages.title: Superior yield
avantages.desc: On average +30% extra revenue vs standard rental. Up to €55/m² on corporate leases, with a favorable tax regime (LMNP).

avantages.title: Operational management
avantages.desc: Inventory, maintenance, cleaning, small works, tenant relations, accounting: we handle absolutely everything with zero involvement on your part.

avantages.title: Optimal occupancy rate
avantages.desc: Thanks to our network of companies and relocation agencies, we maintain an occupancy rate above 95% across our portfolio.

avantages.title: Secure lease
avantages.desc: Civil Code leases (articles 1714-1762), comprehensive home insurance included, up-to-date surveys. Your investment is legally protected at every moment.

avantages.title: Quarterly reporting
avantages.desc: Every quarter, receive a detailed report: revenue, charges, interventions. Full visibility on your property's performance.

process.title: Free estimate
process.desc: We visit your property and provide a rent estimate based on the market.

process.title: Marketing
process.desc: Professional photos, optimized listing, distribution to our corporate network.

process.title: Tenant selection
process.desc: Complete vetting of every application. You validate the chosen profile.

process.title: Full management
process.desc: Lease, inventory, cleaning, maintenance, accounting. You have nothing to do.

estimationPage.metaTitle: Free rent estimate — Move in Paris
estimationPage.metaDescription: Get a free, personalized rent estimate for your Paris apartment based on the 2025 official rent caps.
estimationPage.heroSubtitle: In 30 seconds, discover the rent Move in Paris can achieve for your apartment with our corporate clients — based on the 2025 official Paris rent caps.
estimationPage.selectSuggestion: Select a suggestion above to automatically detect the district.
estimationPage.selectSuggestionEmpty: Select a suggestion: the district is filled in automatically.
estimationPage.calcNote: Calculation based on the 2025 official Paris rent caps (DRIHL, furnished) and Move in Paris corporate conditions. An advisor will validate these figures after a site visit.
estimationPage.stepContactIntro: Leave us your contact details to discover the rent we can achieve for your apartment with our corporate clients — and to schedule a visit to finalize the estimate.
estimationPage.consent: I agree to be contacted by Move in Paris about my estimate and I accept the privacy policy (GDPR). Your data is never shared with third parties.
estimationPage.errorRetry: Error — please try again in a moment.
estimationPage.resultIntro: Here is the rent we can achieve for your apartment with our corporate clients
estimationPage.mipBonusNote: i.e. +25% to +36% thanks to our corporate clientele
estimationPage.rentDetail: , just like the rent cap. Move in Paris service is 100% free —
estimationPage.rentDetail2: , no commission. Charges and utilities (electricity, gas, internet, building charges, boiler maintenance, waste tax) are billed on top to the corporate tenant.
estimationPage.entrustProperty: Entrust my property to Move in Paris →
estimationPage.resultDisclaimer: Indicative estimate based on the 2025 official Paris rent caps (DRIHL, furnished). A Move in Paris advisor will contact you within 24 hours to validate these figures after a site visit. Values may vary depending on condition, view, floor and amenities.

legal.cguSubtitle: These terms define the conditions of use of the website www.move-in-paris.com.
legal.cguPreambuleP1: These Terms of Use (hereinafter "ToU") define the terms and conditions under which Move in Paris, the publisher of the website www.move-in-paris.com, makes its online services available, as well as the rights and obligations of any person accessing the site (hereinafter the "User").
legal.cguPreambuleP2: Accessing and using the website implies full and complete acceptance of these ToU. Move in Paris reserves the right to modify these ToU at any time. The applicable terms are those in force at the time of browsing the site.

cguSections.title: Article 1 — Purpose
paragraphs: The website www.move-in-paris.com is a showcase and matchmaking site intended to present the services of Move in Paris, an agency specializing in furnished apartment rentals in Paris for companies, relocating executives and expatriates.
The site allows users to view available apartments, submit inquiries via contact forms, and learn about the services offered by the agency.

subsections.title: 2.1 Access conditions
subsections.text: The website www.move-in-paris.com is freely accessible to any user with Internet access. All costs incurred by the User to access the service (computer equipment, software, Internet connection, etc.) are their sole responsibility.

subsections.title: 2.2 Availability of the site
subsections.text: Move in Paris implements the necessary means to ensure continuous access to the site. However, Move in Paris cannot guarantee continuous availability and reserves the right to temporarily suspend the site for maintenance, updates, security or any other technical or commercial reason, without this interruption giving rise to any compensation for the User.

subsections.title: 2.3 User behavior
subsections.text: The User agrees to use the site fairly, in accordance with its purpose and applicable legal and regulatory provisions. In particular, the User agrees not to use the site for illegal purposes, not to attempt to disrupt its operation, and not to collect or store personal data concerning other users.

cguSections.title: Article 3 — Intellectual property
paragraphs: All content on the website www.move-in-paris.com (text, images, photographs, videos, sounds, logos, icons, graphic layout, databases, site architecture, etc.) is protected by copyright, trademark law and more generally by French and international legislation on intellectual property.

This content is the exclusive property of Move in Paris or is subject to licenses granted to Move in Paris by their respective owners. Any reproduction, modification, publication, adaptation of all or part of the site elements, by any means or process, is prohibited except with prior written authorization from Move in Paris.
Any breach of this provision will constitute counterfeiting liable to civil and criminal prosecution in accordance with the provisions of the French Intellectual Property Code.

cguSections.title: Article 4 — Personal data
paragraphs: As part of using the site, Move in Paris may collect personal data about you, particularly when you fill out a contact form or information request.

Move in Paris processes this personal data as data controller, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) No. 2016/679 of 27 April 2016 and French law No. 78-17 of 6 January 1978 on data protection. For any information on the processing of your personal data, please consult our Privacy policy.

cguSections.title: Article 5 — Cookies
paragraphs: The website www.move-in-paris.com may use cookies or similar technologies to improve the User's browsing experience, produce visit statistics and analyze the audience of the site.
A cookie is a small text file stored on the User's device when visiting a website. It allows the site to remember information about the visit (pages viewed, visit duration, user preferences, etc.).

In accordance with applicable regulations, cookies not strictly necessary for the functioning of the site are only placed with your consent. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies or be notified when they are placed. For more information, consult our Privacy policy.

subsections.title: 6.1 Site content
subsections.text: Move in Paris strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of information published on the site. However, the information provided on this site is presented for informational and non-exhaustive purposes. Move in Paris cannot guarantee its completeness, accuracy or updating and declines all liability for any imprecision, inaccuracy or omission.

subsections.title: 6.2 Availability of the site and information
subsections.text: Move in Paris cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages, regardless of their causes, origins, nature or consequences, resulting from access to the site or inability to access it, use of the site or use made of it by third parties.

subsections.title: 6.3 Third-party sites
subsections.text: The site may contain hyperlinks to third-party sites. Move in Paris declines all responsibility for the content of these sites, which are not under its control, and cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from access to these sites.

cguSections.title: Article 7 — Applicable law and dispute resolution
paragraphs: These ToU are governed, interpreted and applied in accordance with French law, to the exclusion of any other legal system.
In the event of a dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of these ToU, the parties undertake to attempt to resolve their dispute amicably before any legal action.
Failing an amicable resolution, any dispute will be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent French courts, in particular the Paris Commercial Court.

cguSections.title: Article 8 — Modification of the ToU
paragraphs: Move in Paris reserves the right to modify these ToU at any time without notice. Modifications take effect as soon as they are published on the site. It is the User's responsibility to consult the ToU regularly to be aware of any modifications.
Continued use of the site by the User after any modification of the ToU constitutes acceptance of these modifications.

cguSections.title: Article 9 — Contact
paragraphs: For any question regarding these ToU or use of the site, you can contact Move in Paris by email at contact@move-in-paris.com or by mail at: Move in Paris, 26, rue de l'Étoile, 75017 Paris.

legal.privacySubtitle: Move in Paris is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
legal.privacyPreambuleP1: Move in Paris attaches paramount importance to the protection of your personal data and respect for your privacy. This Privacy Policy aims to inform you transparently about the collection, use, retention and protection of the personal data we process as part of our services.
legal.privacyPreambuleP2: This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) No. 2016/679 of 27 April 2016 and the French Data Protection Act No. 78-17 of 6 January 1978 as amended.

privacySections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: The personal data collected on the website www.move-in-paris.com is processed by Move in Paris, whose details are as follows:
Move in Paris — SAS — 26, rue de l'Étoile, 75017 Paris — contact@move-in-paris.com — +33 1 45 20 06 03

privacySections.title: Data collected and purposes of processing
paragraphs: We only collect data strictly necessary for our purposes: contact details (first name, last name, email, phone), information relating to your property (address, surface, type) as part of an estimate request, content of messages sent via our forms, browsing data (cookies, IP address) for statistical and service improvement purposes.
This data is collected to respond to your requests, manage the contractual relationship, send you commercial information with your consent, and improve our site.

privacySections.title: Legal basis for processing
paragraphs: Processing is based on your consent, on pre-contractual measures taken at your request, on the performance of a contract, or on our legitimate interest in developing our business and improving our services.

privacySections.title: Data recipients
paragraphs: Your personal data is intended exclusively for authorized Move in Paris teams. It may be transmitted to our technical subcontractors (host, email provider, accounting provider) strictly to the extent necessary for the execution of their missions and in compliance with their confidentiality obligations. Your data is never sold to third parties.

privacySections.title: Data retention period
paragraphs: Prospecting data: 3 years from the last contact. Contract data: contract duration + 5 years (legal prescription period). Accounting data: 10 years. Cookies: 13 months maximum.

privacySections.title: Data security
paragraphs: Move in Paris implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your personal data and avoid any loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure or access: HTTPS encryption, secure hosting, restricted access to authorized teams, regular backups.

privacySections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights: access to your data, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, objection and withdrawal of consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@move-in-paris.com with proof of identity.
You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (the French Data Protection Authority) via www.cnil.fr if you consider that your rights are not respected.

privacySections.title: Cookies
paragraphs: Our site uses cookies strictly necessary for its functioning (not subject to consent) as well as, subject to your consent, audience measurement cookies. You can at any time set your preferences in your browser.

privacySections.title: Policy modification
paragraphs: Move in Paris reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any modification will be published on the site and will take effect immediately. We invite you to consult it regularly.

privacySections.title: Contact
paragraphs: For any question relating to the protection of your personal data, contact us at contact@move-in-paris.com or by mail: Move in Paris, 26, rue de l'Étoile, 75017 Paris.

legal.contentNotice: The official legal texts (legal notice, terms of use, privacy policy) are also available in French. For any questions, please contact us.
